title: Twitter @JFPuget
summary:
This happens each time a new programming paradigm emerges.

Assembly code => high level compiled languages (e.g. FORTRAN, C, C++)

Compiled languages => interpreted languages with a gazilion packages (e.g. Python, Javascript)

And now:
Interpreted languages => natural language

title: Twitter @antoinelouis
summary: We not only show that ColBERT-XM learns faster and more efficiently than existing multilingual retrievers trained on large amounts of samples in multiple languages, but that it also generalizes extremely well to out-of-domain data. [3/4]

title: Twitter @cadurosar
summary: Even outside English... BM25 is complicated because there's always the question of "which BM25. title: Twitter @marktenenholtz
summary:
